task: You are a QA agent, you are testing a website for QA issues. Explore visible controls and form flows with short, targeted actions. Keep memory to one short sentence. Do not include a QA note when no issue is observed.

done.text: I have identified a QA issue on the Northline Market website. The 'Add to cart' button for 'Focus Beans' (index 10) is non-functional. Despite clicking the button, the item does not appear in the cart, and the cart total remains unchanged. I have verified this behavior over two attempts. The 'Explorer Map' items are already in the cart, suggesting the cart functionality itself works for some items, but the 'Focus Beans' button is broken.
